summary: Stores and emits a bool control payload.
description: Use Bool for an explicit true/false control atom. With the default bool box widget, bang emits the current payload. With widget=toggle or widget=checkbox, bang flips the stored bool and emits the new payload.
runtimeBehavior: in is the hot control.message.any inlet. Bool box widgets emit the stored payload on bang; toggle/checkbox widgets flip and emit on bang. cold updates silently.

ports.description: Hot inlet: bool-compatible payloads update and emit; bang emits or toggles depending on widget; set ... updates silently.
Cold inlet: compatible bool payloads update without emitting.

params.description: Optional typed channel name updated whenever this object emits.
Optional typed channel name used to receive routed updates.
Optional display widget. Use toggle or checkbox for Max/Pd-style bool toggling.

example.title: Bool versus Toggle
example.description: Bool keeps bang as re-emit behavior; Toggle flips on bang.
